name: Sweet & Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, boned and cut into 8 ounces Pineapple chunks, canned un
1/3 cup Dark brown sugar, firmly packed
1 teaspoon Dried cilantro or 10 fresh leaves
recipeInstructions:
For crockpot cooking:
1. Place vegetables in the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
4. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, make rice. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
For oven cooking:
1. Place vegetables in the bottom of a greased pan.
2. Sprinkle vegetables with tapioca.
3. Add chicken to the pan.
4. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours.
8. Before serving, make rice. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
